compiled_state.title: Add SKILL_INVOKE/SKILL_RESUMED breadcrumbs to sprint/SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Instrument 7 Skill tool call sites in sprint/SKILL.md:
- 4 implementation-plan sites (~lines 239, 254, 345, retry ~361)
- 3 preplanning sites (~lines 249, 260, 267)

Before each Skill tool call: add Bash echo for SKILL_INVOKE with skill_name, depth=1, timestamp to /tmp/dso-skill-trace log || true
After each Skill return: add Bash echo for SKILL_RESUMED with elapsed_ms || true

Pure Markdown edits — no script logic introduced.

## TDD Requirement
Unit test exemption — criterion 1 (no conditional logic: echo commands with no branching) + criterion 3 (SKILL.md is LLM instruction text, not executable code; any test would grep for echo strings which is a change-detector). Integration test rejected: no dry-run mode for SKILL.md echo commands; analysis script synthetic test validates format end-to-end.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] SKILL_INVOKE at 7+ sites
  Verify: grep -c 'SKILL_INVOKE' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] SKILL_RESUMED at 7+ sites
  Verify: grep -c 'SKILL_RESUMED' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] All echo commands use || true (no unsafe breadcrumbs)
  Verify: grep 'echo.*SKILL_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | grep -v '|| true' | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'

comments.body: Fixed: Task completed — all AC verified by completion-verifier
comments.author: Test
